creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
Created attachment 155421
Ports for MooseFS Command Line Interface 2.0.61-1

The new port sysutils/moosefs-cli: MooseFS Command Line Interface version 2.0.61-1. 

We created totally new (and official) ports and we want to become the ports maintainer.

In attachment is a tarball containing ports tree for MoooseFS Command Line Interface.
